title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners, Surprises and Snubs - Essence
text: The 2026 Golden Globes featured notable winners, surprising upsets, and controversial snubs. Teyana Taylor claimed Best Supporting Actress for One Battle After Another. Hamnet unexpectedly won Best Motion Picture Drama, with director Chloé Zhao appearing shocked. Ryan Coogler's Sinners dominated technical categories but failed to secure top creative honors, disappointing observers. Wagner Moura won Best Actor Drama for The Secret Agent. Best Picture Comedy/Musical went to One Battle After Another. Best Director went to Paul Thomas Anderson. Television saw The Pitt win Best Drama and The Studio win Best Comedy. Adolescence dominated with four wins. The ceremony balanced expected victories with controversial decisions generating substantial industry discussion.
